headline: Shares of travel-related companies are trading higher amid a drop in oil prices after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. postponed strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days, which may ease inflation concerns. ICE agents deployed to airports to ease TSA shortages amid a partial government shutdown may alleviate travel complications.
